run_summary.health_reason: 3 tests failing; 1 brittle test with hard-coded ID detected in product suite

failed_tests.name: categoryController > should return 500 if database throws
failed_tests.fix_hint: Mock mongoose to throw before calling the controller; ensure error handler returns 500 not 200

failed_tests.name: authController > should reject login with invalid password
failed_tests.error_message: Exceeded timeout of 5000ms for a test. Use jest.setTimeout(n) to increase timeout
failed_tests.fix_hint: Mock bcrypt.compare to resolve immediately instead of actually hashing; bcrypt is slow in tests

failed_tests.name: Admin Orders > should display all orders in table
failed_tests.fix_hint: Check that the admin orders route is accessible before waiting for the table selector

brittle_tests.name: productController > should fetch product by id
brittle_tests.reason: Hard-coded ID '64f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c0d1' in assertion — breaks across MongoDB instances
brittle_tests.recommendation: Use a dynamically generated ObjectId from the test setup instead of hard-coding the value

brittle_tests.name: authController > should register user
brittle_tests.reason: Assertion on exact error message string 'Email is already taken' — fragile if message changes
brittle_tests.recommendation: Assert on status code only, or use expect.stringContaining() for partial message matching

anti_patterns.details: Suite has only 1 test — likely incomplete coverage for auth middleware edge cases

suggested_new_test.test_name: categoryController > should return 400 when category name is empty string
suggested_new_test.what_to_assert: POST /api/v1/category/create with empty name body returns 400 status and validation error message
suggested_new_test.rationale: Current suite only tests missing name; empty string is a distinct boundary case

top_priority_fixes: Fix categoryController test mock — ensure error handler path returns 500 not 200 (line ~45 in categoryController.test.js)
Replace hard-coded MongoDB ObjectId in productController test with dynamic test fixture ID
Mock bcrypt.compare in authController tests to prevent timeout on slow hash operations
